signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2% (up from 2.0% in Feb), beating lower-than-expected forecasts of 2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][3]

This data was reported in early sources dated around March 5, 2026, marking a recent uptick from February's steady 2.0% (in line with the Bank of Korea's 2% target) but still contained amid global energy volatility from the Iran conf
